chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P N0.D-1622 0f 2023 Dat٤ Order with signature of Jucge For hearing of main case 11.01.2024 None present for the Petitioner Mr Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for Respondent / University Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, AAG n٧ و ٧ 4وو n n4 ٦ ٣٦ Learned Counsel representing the Respondent University has filed schedule of payment to the petitioner in respect of pensionary benefits which is taken On recor. No one is present behalf of petitioner however instant petition disposed terms schedule payment submitted Counsel for tne University However default or ٨٥٨ payment of said amount to the petitioner would expose violator to the contempt proceedings
